candidate_primary_source_note: Wikimedia Commons listing for Heiberg Greek edition PDF. PDF facsimile downloaded and locally hashed on 2026-05-16. PDF remains the facsimile base for page, diagram, table, and final image checks. PAL Heiberg transcription has been ingested as CC BY auxiliary Greek source control.
facsimile_page_count_method: PDF internal page tree maximum /Count value; /Type /Page marker scan returned 590 including page-tree noise, so /Count=589 is the recorded control value.
facsimile_hash_note: A previously noted Wikimedia SHA1 value did not match the file delivered through Special:Redirect/file on 2026-05-16. Treat local SHA1/SHA256 as the repository preservation hash and re-check against Wikimedia file history before publication.
pal_transcription_role: auxiliary Greek transcription for source text extraction and OCR/transcription error control; not a replacement for PDF facsimile checks

source_role_hierarchy.primary_facsimile: Heiberg PDF scan: base-image authority for Greek text verification, page layout, figures, tables, apparatus areas, and final facsimile figures
source_role_hierarchy.auxiliary_greek_transcription: PAL Heiberg XML: searchable Greek transcription for extraction, segmentation, page markers, participle-chain and sentence control, and OCR/transcription discrepancy checks
source_role_hierarchy.reference_translation: English translations: reference witness only for difficult understanding and difference summaries; not a pivot source and not OCR/transcription authority

pal_license_note: LICENSE.md says CC BY 4.0 applies to all transcriptions except the listed Quadripartitum exception; Mathematike Syntaxis #1/#19 is not that exception.
